channel.title: Dimension 20 Live
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Live on Dropout.tv

item.title: What is a Time Quangle?
item.description:
The ultimate time quangle is approaching! On July 20th, Brennan and the Intrepid Heroes will be performing at Seattle's Climate Pledge Arena to journey through a time quangle unlike any quangle before it! Get your tickets here:https://www.ticketmaster.com/dimension-20-live-2025-quangle-quest-seattle-washington-07-20-2025/event/0F00614EA4CC18D2

Duration: 00:46

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, Dimension 20, Time Quangle, tabletop rpg, dungeons and dragons, 5e, multiverse, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan, announcements
